logistics.lodging_strategy: Numerous hotels and resorts with participant discounts via Tourisme Mont-Tremblant; ideal for active weekends with family/friends.

final_verdict.one_liner: Scenic, well-organized road sportive in Laurentians ideal for season-opening endurance challenge.

videos.title: Discover cycling in the Mont-Tremblant region
videos.description:
The Gran Fondo Mont-Tremlant brought us to the region 130 km northwest of Montreal. We went back, not only to participate in the big event, but to explore the great roads and to dine at some of the great restaurants in the Mont-Tremblant area.

CYCLING NEWS/FEATURES/VIDEOS: http://cyclingmagazine.ca/

FOLLOW US!
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/canadiancycling/
Twitter: https://twitter.com/CDNCyclingMag
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/cyclingmag?fref=ts

quotes.text: You feel like you're in a mini Tour de France here with the police in front there's that experience that prestige and my reward is when cyclists cross the finish line and are happy about their experience and the way their pack behaved safe fluid and at the right speed.

terrain_notes.text: Beautiful roads with beautiful scenery throughout the Mont-Tremblant region.

race_day_tips.text: Good chance to challenge yourself in September after riding all summer, with police security allowing you to ride through red lights safely.
Safe environment for first-timers to learn about riding in groups without worrying about traffic.

additional_quotes.text: My reward is when cyclists cross the finish line and are happy about their experience and the way their pack behaved safe fluid and at the right speed and this is how we cater to close to 2000 cyclist

You get security from the police, it's well organized by people have done that before and it's helping you get a ride with your friend without worrying about traffic and there's nothing much more fun than being in a group ride where you can go straight through the red lights
I had the people from working here on the station saying this is amazing to see so much cyclists we used to see a lot of athletes around but you see a community of cyclists

rider_intel.search_text: Gran Fondo Mont-Tremblant is a mass cycling event in the beautiful Mont-Tremblant region of Quebec that caters to close to 2000 cyclists. The event offers two distances: 80k for beginners and those new to the sport, and 125k for more challenging riding. Riders describe beautiful roads with stunning scenery throughout the region. The event provides police security that allows cyclists to ride safely through red lights without worrying about traffic. Feed stations provide drinks and food along the route. The atmosphere is described as having Tour de France prestige with police escorts, creating a safe and fun environment for both experienced riders and first-timers to learn group riding skills. Local communities are welcoming, with station workers expressing amazement at seeing so many cyclists together. The event concludes with food, friends, drinks and a big party celebration, following the traditional Italian gran fondo format of bringing the cycling community together.
